title: Redis Latency Spike
symptoms: Application APIs experience degraded performance due to cache misses or timeouts
root_cause_analysis: Redis is blocking on an expensive command (e.g., KEYS or massive SMEMBERS), memory fragmentation is high, or network saturation between the app and Redis cluster.
resolution_steps: 1. Run 'SLOWLOG GET' to identify expensive or blocking commands.
2. If an expensive command is found, identify the offending service and disable the feature or patch the command.
3. Check 'INFO memory' for fragmentation ratio. If high, schedule a restart during off-peak.
4. Scale read-replicas if this is purely a read-heavy traffic spike.
